name: MedBullets-5op
description: Clinical case multi-choice — USMLE Step 2/3-style questions from MedBullets. 5-option format, harder than 4-option MedQA. ~308 questions per split.
note: Not found in BMT/BMT.json — consider submitting this benchmark to BMT registry.

name: NEJM Image Challenge
description: New England Journal of Medicine weekly image-based diagnostic challenge — 935+ image-clinical-vignette MCQs across all medical specialties. Vision-language reasoning gold standard. GPT-5.5 73.4, Med-Gemini-L 65.0.
note: Not found in BMT/BMT.json — consider submitting this benchmark to BMT registry.

name: JAMA Clinical Challenge
description: JAMA Network clinical case quiz — diagnostic reasoning on real patient vignettes. 1,524 cases across primary care, internal medicine, emergency.
note: Not found in BMT/BMT.json — consider submitting this benchmark to BMT registry.

name: Universal Med-Seg Dice
description: Universal medical-segmentation benchmark — Dice Similarity Coefficient across 11+ modalities (CT/MRI/X-ray/endoscopy/ultrasound/dermoscopy/fundus). MedSAM 92.0 median, MedSAM2 89.2, SAM-Med2D 88.3, vanilla SAM 58.7.
note: Not found in BMT/BMT.json — consider submitting this benchmark to BMT registry.

name: RetBench (External AUC)
description: Ophthalmic foundation-model evaluation suite — external validation AUC on glaucoma, DR (diabetic retinopathy), AMD (age-related macular degeneration), diabetes, hypertension prediction from retinal images. RETFound 89.0, VisionFM 90.5.
note: Not found in BMT/BMT.json — consider submitting this benchmark to BMT registry.

name: Pathology External Benchmark
description: Pathology FM external evaluation — 9-task average AUROC across cancer subtyping + biomarker prediction (BRCA, RCC, NSCLC, MSI-CRC, etc.). Virchow2 0.82, UNI2 0.79, Prov-GigaPath 0.787, CONCH 0.764.
note: Not found in BMT/BMT.json — consider submitting this benchmark to BMT registry.

name: KMLE (Korean Medical Licensing Exam)

name: EHRQA
description: Electronic Health Record question answering — clinical information retrieval over EHR notes. MedGemma evaluation reference.

name: RAD-ChestCT

name: AlphaFold3 Confident Predictions
